vulnerabilities.title: OpenSSL Use After Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.summary: A use after free vulnerability in OpenSSL allows remote attackers to cause denial of service

vulnerabilities.title: libopensbi privilege escalation
vulnerabilities.summary: libopensbi has a buffer overflow allowing privilege escalation

vulnerabilities.title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack
vulnerabilities.summary: The HTTP/2 protocol allows a denial of service
